exclusion_rules.description: Only senior citizens aged 70 years and above are eligible for this expansion. Family members below 70 are not covered under this specific extension.

family_criteria.family_definition: Any family with a member aged 70 or above qualifies. The 70+ member gets an additional top-up card. Existing PM-JAY family coverage (if any) continues separately. Families already covered under PM-JAY get an additional Rs 5 lakh specifically for the 70+ member.

covered_procedures: All 1,393 packages covered under base PM-JAY

required_documents.name: Aadhaar Card
required_documents.notes: Primary document for age verification and e-KYC. Date of birth on Aadhaar must show age 70 or above.

required_documents.name: Mobile Number
required_documents.notes: Linked to Aadhaar for OTP verification. Family member's number acceptable if senior citizen does not have one.

required_documents.name: Existing Ayushman Card (if any)
required_documents.notes: If the family already has a PM-JAY card, bring it for linkage. Not mandatory for new enrollees.

enrollment_channels: Common Service Centre (CSC / Jan Seva Kendra)
enrollment_steps: Step 1: Visit nearest CSC or empanelled hospital with the senior citizen's Aadhaar card
Step 2: Inform the operator that you are applying under the PM-JAY 70+ expansion
Step 3: Complete Aadhaar e-KYC (biometric or OTP) to verify age is 70+
Step 4: System auto-verifies eligibility — no SECC check or income proof required
Step 5: New Ayushman Vay Vandana Card issued with Rs 5 lakh additional coverage
Step 6: If family already has PM-JAY card, the 70+ top-up is linked to existing family ID
Step 7: Card is valid immediately for cashless treatment at any empanelled hospital
description_for_embedding: PM-JAY 70+ is an expansion of Ayushman Bharat announced by PM Modi on September 29, 2024 that provides an additional Rs 5 lakh health cover per year to ALL senior citizens aged 70 and above, regardless of income, SECC status, or existing insurance. This is universal — no means test, no BPL requirement. The coverage is ON TOP of any existing PM-JAY family coverage. Approximately 6 crore senior citizens across 4.5 crore families benefit. Enrollment requires only Aadhaar card for age proof. A new Ayushman Vay Vandana Card is issued.
